nasb.text: Whoever believes that Jesus is the Christ is born of God, and whoever loves the Father loves the child born of Him.

esv.text: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born of God, and everyone who loves the Father loves whoever has been born of him.

cnv.text: 凡信耶穌是基督的，都是從　神生的，凡愛那生他的，也必愛那從他而生的。

ccb.text: 每一个信耶稣是基督的人，都是从上帝生的。凡爱生他之上帝的，也爱上帝所生的。

csbs.text: 凡是相信耶稣是基督的，都是由神所生的。凡是爱那生身之父的，也都爱那由父所生的。
